news.t: Ocean Park Asset Management Announces Launch of First Four Actively Managed ETFs

overview.description: The Ocean Park High Income ETF (DUKH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that tactically allocates assets across high-yield fixed income ETFs that are unconstrained by maturity or geography. The fund seeks to provide total return while mitigating downside risk. DUKH was launched on Jul 10, 2024 and is issued by Ocean Park.

data.title: Ocean Park Asset Management Announces Launch of First Four Actively Managed ETFs
data.text: SANTA MONICA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $DUKH--Ocean Park Asset Management launched its first exchange-traded funds (ETFs) on July 11, 2024. These new ETFs are emblematic of Ocean Park's commitment ...
